message: feat: add continuous paste target monitoring

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,179 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class PasteTargetMonitorTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testStartRegistersActivationNotificationsOnlyOnce() {
+        let notifier = RecordingActivationNotifier()
+        let monitor = ContinuousPasteTargetMonitor(
+            activationNotifier: notifier,
+            observerFactory: RecordingAccessibilityObserverFactory()
+        )
+
+        monitor.start()
+        monitor.start()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(notifier.observeCallCount, 1)
+    }
+
+    func testActivationNotificationsSynchronizeToFrontmostApplication() {
+        let notifier = RecordingActivationNotifier()
+        let factory = RecordingAccessibilityObserverFactory()
+        let monitor = ContinuousPasteTargetMonitor(
+            activationNotifier: notifier,
+            observerFactory: factory
+        )
+
+        monitor.start()
+        notifier.emit(FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 17, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor"))
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(factory.requestedProcessIDs, [17])
+    }
+
+    func testSynchronizeToDifferentApplicationClearsObservationAndReinstallsObserver() {
+        let factory = RecordingAccessibilityObserverFactory()
+        let firstObserver = RecordingProcessAccessibilityObserver()
+        let secondObserver = RecordingProcessAccessibilityObserver()
+        factory.observers = [firstObserver, secondObserver]
+        let monitor = ContinuousPasteTargetMonitor(
+            activationNotifier: RecordingActivationNotifier(),
+            observerFactory: factory
+        )
+
+        monitor.record(PasteTargetObservation(processID: 17, windowID: 91, status: .editable))
+        monitor.synchronize(to: FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 17, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor"))
+
+        monitor.record(PasteTargetObservation(processID: 17, windowID: 91, status: .editable))
+        XCTAssertNotNil(monitor.currentObservation)
+
+        monitor.synchronize(to: FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 18, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Terminal"))
+
+        XCTAssertNil(monitor.currentObservation)
+        XCTAssertTrue(firstObserver.invalidateCallCount == 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(factory.requestedProcessIDs, [17, 18])
+    }
+
+    func testSynchronizeToSameApplicationDoesNotReinstallObserver() {
+        let factory = RecordingAccessibilityObserverFactory()
+        factory.observers = [RecordingProcessAccessibilityObserver()]
+        let monitor = ContinuousPasteTargetMonitor(
+            activationNotifier: RecordingActivationNotifier(),
+            observerFactory: factory
+        )
+        let application = FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 17, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor")
+
+        monitor.synchronize(to: application)
+        monitor.synchronize(to: application)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(factory.requestedProcessIDs, [17])
+    }
+
+    func testFocusAndWindowNotificationsRecordEditableAndNonEditableObservations() {
+        let factory = RecordingAccessibilityObserverFactory()
+        let observer = RecordingProcessAccessibilityObserver()
+        factory.observers = [observer]
+        let monitor = ContinuousPasteTargetMonitor(
+            activationNotifier: RecordingActivationNotifier(),
+            observerFactory: factory
+        )
+
+        monitor.synchronize(to: FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 17, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor"))
+        observer.emit(
+            .init(
+                processID: 17,
+                notification: .focusedElementChanged,
+                element: TestAccessibilityElement(role: kAXTextFieldRole as String, isFocused: true, windowID: 91)
+            )
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            monitor.currentObservation,
+            PasteTargetObservation(processID: 17, windowID: 91, status: .editable)
+        )
+
+        observer.emit(
+            .init(
+                processID: 17,
+                notification: .focusedWindowChanged,
+                element: TestAccessibilityElement(role: "AXWindow", windowID: 91)
+            )
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            monitor.currentObservation,
+            PasteTargetObservation(processID: 17, windowID: 91, status: .nonEditable)
+        )
+    }
+
+    func testOtherNotificationsAreIgnored() {
+        let factory = RecordingAccessibilityObserverFactory()
+        let observer = RecordingProcessAccessibilityObserver()
+        factory.observers = [observer]
+        let monitor = ContinuousPasteTargetMonitor(
+            activationNotifier: RecordingActivationNotifier(),
+            observerFactory: factory
+        )
+
+        monitor.synchronize(to: FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 17, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor"))
+        observer.emit(
+            .init(
+                processID: 17,
+                notification: .other("AXSomethingElse"),
+                element: TestAccessibilityElement(role: "AXGroup", windowID: 91)
+            )
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertNil(monitor.currentObservation)
+    }
+}
+
+private final class RecordingActivationNotifier: ApplicationActivationNotifying {
+    private(set) var observeCallCount = 0
+    private var handler: (@Sendable (FrontmostApplicationContext?) -> Void)?
+
+    func observe(_ handler: @escaping @Sendable (FrontmostApplicationContext?) -> Void) -> any ActivationObserving {
+        observeCallCount += 1
+        self.handler = handler
+        return ActivationToken()
+    }
+
+    func emit(_ application: FrontmostApplicationContext?) {
+        handler?(application)
+    }
+}
+
+private final class ActivationToken: ActivationObserving {
+    func invalidate() {
+    }
+}
+
+private final class RecordingAccessibilityObserverFactory: AccessibilityObserverCreating {
+    var observers: [RecordingProcessAccessibilityObserver] = []
+    private(set) var requestedProcessIDs: [pid_t] = []
+
+    func make(
+        processID: pid_t,
+        handler: @escaping (AccessibilityObserverEvent) -> Void
+    ) -> (any ProcessAccessibilityObserving)? {
+        requestedProcessIDs.append(processID)
+        guard !observers.isEmpty else {
+            return nil
+        }
+
+        let observer = observers.removeFirst()
+        observer.handler = handler
+        return observer
+    }
+}
+
+private final class RecordingProcessAccessibilityObserver: ProcessAccessibilityObserving {
+    var handler: ((AccessibilityObserverEvent) -> Void)?
+    private(set) var invalidateCallCount = 0
+
+    func emit(_ event: AccessibilityObserverEvent) {
+        handler?(event)
+    }
+
+    func invalidate() {
+        invalidateCallCount += 1
+    }
+}
